detectors.description:
SAFE_GIFT.GetGift(bytes) (SAFE_GIFT.sol#9-25) sends eth to arbitrary user
	Dangerous calls:
	- msg.sender.transfer(this.balance) (SAFE_GIFT.sol#21)
detectors.markdown:
[SAFE_GIFT.GetGift(bytes)](SAFE_GIFT.sol#L9-L25) sends eth to arbitrary user
	Dangerous calls:
	- [msg.sender.transfer(this.balance)](SAFE_GIFT.sol#L21)

detectors.description:
SAFE_GIFT.SetGiftTime(uint256) (SAFE_GIFT.sol#97-111) should emit an event for: 
	- giftTime = date (SAFE_GIFT.sol#107)

detectors.description:
SAFE_GIFT.SetReciver(address)._reciver (SAFE_GIFT.sol#115) lacks a zero-check on :
		- reciver = _reciver (SAFE_GIFT.sol#125)

SAFE_GIFT.GetGift() (SAFE_GIFT.sol#29-45) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- msg.sender == reciver && now > giftTime (SAFE_GIFT.sol#37)
